data.body:
## Description
Create a test that validates the preplanning SKILL.md contains an integration research step.

The test should verify:
- SKILL.md contains an 'Integration Research' or 'integration research' section after story decomposition and before adversarial review
- The section references WebSearch for finding known-working code
- The section references 'Verified Integration Constraints' as the output format
- The section references sandbox availability flagging
- The section references high-risk flagging for spike creation

Test approach: grep the SKILL.md for these structural markers.
Tests must FAIL (RED) since the integration research step does not exist yet.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_preplanning_integration_research.py — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_preplanning_integration_research.py
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_preplanning_integration_research.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
